summary: Created MetaMask-style delegation product surface with create, inspect, and revoke capabilities. The Delegations page (590 lines) provides a full CRUD UI for scoped CEO-to-department-to-task delegation chains with configurable permissions (spend limits, recipient whitelists, time windows, task permissions). Guardrail messaging shows readable rejection reasons for invalid, expired, or overscoped actions. Integrated into App.tsx routing and cockpit AppShell navigation.

strengths: Well-structured component with clear separation of concerns (form, chain display, inspection, guardrail testing)
Permission validation is thorough — checks amount, recipient, time window, and task permissions
Clear guardrail rejection messages with human-readable reasons
Status badges (active/revoked/expired) provide immediate visual feedback
Address truncation helper for wallet addresses

issues.description: The delegation framework is in-memory only (no Supabase persistence). Chains reset on page reload. This is documented as expected for the proof surface.

testCoverage.notes: 13 tests in delegation-surface.test.tsx (page rendering) + 52 tests in delegations.test.ts (core delegation logic, chain building, validation, revocation, guardrails).
